name: Satoru Gojo
description: The strongest jujutsu sorcerer in the world. He possesses both the Limitless cursed technique and the Six Eyes.

skills.name: Cursed Technique Lapse: Blue
skills.description: Gojo creates a vacuum that pulls in everything around it, dealing 20 damage to one enemy and stunning them for 1 turn.

skills.name: Cursed Technique Reversal: Red
skills.description: Gojo creates a repelling force, dealing 35 damage to one enemy. This ignores damage reduction.

skills.name: Hollow Technique: Purple
skills.description: Gojo combines Blue and Red to erase everything in its path, dealing 60 damage to one enemy. If the enemy dies, they cannot be resurrected.

skills.name: Infinity
skills.description: Gojo becomes completely invulnerable to all damage and negative effects for 1 turn. While active, he cannot use 'Hollow Technique: Purple'.

name: Yuji Itadori
description: A physically gifted high school student who became the vessel of Ryomen Sukuna. He fights with extraordinary strength and cursed energy-infused blows.

skills.name: Martial Arts
skills.description: Yuji uses his incredible physical prowess to strike an enemy, dealing 20 damage.

skills.name: Divergent Fist
skills.description: Yuji strikes an enemy for 15 damage. A second cursed energy wave hits the target at the start of their next turn for 15 additional damage.

skills.name: Black Flash
skills.description: Yuji unleashes a strike with a spatial distortion, dealing 45 damage to one enemy. This skill has a 25% chance to cost 0 energy.

skills.name: Unyielding Resolve
skills.description: Yuji's sheer willpower keeps him fighting. For 2 turns, any damage that would reduce Yuji's health below 1 instead leaves him at 1 health.

name: Megumi Fushiguro
description: A grade 2 jujutsu sorcerer and descendant of the Zenin Clan, using the Ten Shadows Technique to manifest shikigami from shadows.

skills.name: Divine Dogs
skills.description: Megumi summons his Divine Dogs to attack, dealing 20 damage to one enemy. Costs 1 less random energy if a shikigami is already active.

skills.name: Nue
skills.description: Megumi summons Nue, shocking one enemy for 15 damage and stunning them for 1 turn.

skills.name: Toad
skills.description: Megumi summons a Toad to protect an ally. The target ally becomes invulnerable to the next harmful skill aimed at them.

skills.name: Chimera Shadow Garden
skills.description: Megumi expands his incomplete Domain. For 3 turns, all of Megumi's skills cost 1 random energy less and he deals 10 extra damage with every attack.

name: Nobara Kugisaki
description: A confident grade 3 jujutsu sorcerer who uses a hammer, nails, and straw dolls for her Straw Doll Technique.

skills.name: Nail Toss
skills.description: Nobara throws cursed energy-infused nails at one enemy, dealing 15 damage.

skills.name: Hairpin
skills.description: Nobara detonates her nails with cursed energy. Deals 25 damage to one enemy. If 'Nail Toss' was used on that target last turn, this deals 15 additional damage.

skills.name: Resonance
skills.description: Nobara strikes her straw doll, transmitting damage through the soul. Deals 30 damage to one enemy, ignoring invulnerability and damage reduction.

skills.name: Straw Doll Connection
skills.description: Nobara links herself to one enemy for 2 turns. Any damage Nobara takes is also dealt to the linked enemy.

name: Kento Nanami
description: A grade 1 jujutsu sorcerer who uses the Ratio Technique to divide his target with a 7:3 ratio, creating a mandatory weak spot.

skills.name: Blunt Strike
skills.description: Nanami strikes the enemy with his bandaged cleaver, dealing 20 damage.

skills.name: Ratio Technique: 7:3
skills.description: Nanami forcibly creates a weak spot on a target. For 2 turns, all damage dealt to that enemy is increased by 15.

skills.name: Collapse
skills.description: Nanami strikes the ground to destroy the environment. Deals 20 damage to all enemies. Enemies affected by '7:3' are also stunned for 1 turn.

skills.name: Overtime
skills.description: Nanami lifts his time restriction, unleashing restricted cursed energy. For 3 turns, all of his skills deal double damage.

name: Yuta Okkotsu
description: A special grade jujutsu sorcerer with immense cursed energy, accompanied by the vengeful cursed spirit Rika Orimoto.

skills.name: Katana Strike
skills.description: Yuta strikes with his katana infused with cursed energy, dealing 15 damage. If 'Rika Manifestation' is active, this deals 25 damage instead.

skills.name: Cursed Speech
skills.description: Yuta uses a copied cursed speech technique to command his target. The target enemy is stunned for 1 turn.

skills.name: Reverse Cursed Technique
skills.description: Yuta uses positive energy to heal an ally or himself for 30 health.

skills.name: Rika Manifestation
skills.description: Yuta fully manifests Rika for 3 turns. He gains 15 damage reduction, his skills are enhanced, and melee attackers receive 10 reflected damage.

name: Aoi Todo
description: A grade 1 jujutsu sorcerer from Kyoto High with overwhelming physical strength and the Boogie Woogie technique.

skills.name: Crushing Blow
skills.description: Todo delivers a heavy punch, dealing 25 damage to one enemy.

skills.name: Boogie Woogie
skills.description: Todo claps his hands, swapping positions between two targets. One ally swaps with one enemy, removing all negative effects from the ally and causing the enemy to miss their next skill.

skills.name: Disorienting Swap
skills.description: Todo swaps positions with the enemy right before striking, dealing 20 damage and making the enemy's next skill cost 1 additional random energy.

skills.name: Best Friend
skills.description: Todo fights alongside his 'brother'. For 3 turns, whenever an ally attacks, Todo performs a follow-up strike on the same target for 10 damage.

name: Maki Zenin
description: A student from the Zenin Clan with a Heavenly Restriction that strips away her cursed energy in exchange for superhuman physical ability.

skills.name: Playful Cloud
skills.description: Maki strikes with her three-section staff, dealing 25 damage to one enemy.

skills.name: Dragon-Bone
skills.description: Maki absorbs incoming force and redirects it. She gains 10 damage reduction this turn, and her next attack deals 15 additional damage.

skills.name: Split Soul Katana
skills.description: Maki slashes her target with a special grade weapon, dealing 30 damage. This attack permanently reduces the target's maximum health by the damage dealt.

skills.name: Heavenly Restriction
skills.description: Maki's physical senses reach their peak. For 3 turns, she evades all non-Physical skills and counter-attacks any Physical skill aimed at her for 15 damage.

name: Toji Fushiguro
description: Known as the Sorcerer Killer. Toji traded all of his cursed energy for a Heavenly Restriction that grants superhuman physical ability — he fights without cursed techniques.

skills.name: Brutal Strike
skills.description: Toji delivers a devastating unarmed blow to one enemy, dealing 25 damage.

skills.name: Inverted Spear of Heaven
skills.description: Toji wields his signature weapon, nullifying all cursed technique effects on the target. Deals 30 damage and removes all buffs from the enemy.

skills.name: Heavenly Restriction: Peak Body
skills.description: Toji pushes his cursed-energy-free body to its absolute limit. For 2 turns, he deals 15 extra damage with all attacks and evades all non-Physical skills.

skills.name: Playful Cloud: Sorcerer Killer
skills.description: Toji wields Playful Cloud with lethal precision, striking a target 3 times for 20 damage each (60 total). One hit ignores invulnerability.

name: Suguru Geto
description: A former special grade sorcerer turned curse user who can absorb and manipulate cursed spirits. He believes cursed spirits should rule over non-sorcerers.

skills.name: Cursed Spirit Projectile
skills.description: Geto releases a low-grade cursed spirit at one enemy, dealing 20 damage.

skills.name: Cursed Spirit Manipulation
skills.description: Geto absorbs a cursed spirit from his stock. For 2 turns, the next time an enemy ability is used, Geto counters with a cursed spirit for 25 damage.

skills.name: Uzumaki
skills.description: Geto fuses multiple cursed spirits into one enormous entity and slams it into all enemies, dealing 35 damage to each.

skills.name: Maximum: Uzumaki
skills.description: Geto fuses every cursed spirit he possesses into a single catastrophic explosion. Deals 60 damage to all enemies and applies a curse mark that deals 10 damage per turn for 2 turns.

name: Ryomen Sukuna
description: The undisputed King of Curses. An immensely powerful cursed spirit from the Heian Era who now resides within Yuji Itadori.

skills.name: Dismantle
skills.description: Sukuna sends a slashing attack at his target, dealing 25 damage to one enemy. This deals an additional 10 damage to summoned entities.

skills.name: Cleave
skills.description: Sukuna adjusts the strength of his slash to the target's toughness, dealing 30 damage that ignores invulnerability.

skills.name: Fire Arrow
skills.description: Sukuna unleashes a devastating arrow of flames. Deals 40 damage to one enemy. If 'Malevolent Shrine' is active, this deals 70 damage instead.

skills.name: Malevolent Shrine
skills.description: Sukuna opens his Domain, applying 'Shrine' to all enemies. While 'Shrine' is active, all enemies take 15 damage at the start of their turn for 3 turns.

name: Mahito
description: A special grade cursed spirit born from humanity's hatred and fear of each other. He can reshape souls through touch.

skills.name: Soul Strike
skills.description: Mahito attacks the enemy's soul directly, dealing 20 damage. This damage cannot be healed by any means.

skills.name: Idle Transfiguration
skills.description: Mahito alters the shape of the enemy's soul. Deals 30 damage. If the target's health is below 20%, they are instantly killed.

skills.name: Body Repel
skills.description: Mahito manipulates his own soul to regenerate his body. He heals 25 health and removes all negative effects.

skills.name: Self-Embodiment of Perfection
skills.description: Mahito expands his Domain. For 3 turns, he becomes invulnerable, and 'Idle Transfiguration' targets all enemies and costs no energy.

name: Jogo
description: A special grade cursed spirit born from the fear of volcanic disasters. He wields devastating fire and lava abilities and looks down on humans.

skills.name: Ember Bugs
skills.description: Jogo summons explosive insects that attach to one enemy. Deals 15 damage now and 15 more damage at the start of the target's next turn.

skills.name: Disaster Flames
skills.description: Jogo unleashes a torrent of cursed fire, dealing 30 damage to one enemy and applying a burn that deals 10 damage per turn for 2 turns.

skills.name: Maximum: Meteor
skills.description: Jogo summons a massive fiery meteor. After a 1-turn delay, it crashes down for 60 damage to all enemies. Enemies may spend 1 random energy to evade it.

skills.name: Coffin of the Iron Mountain
skills.description: Jogo expands his Domain. For 3 turns, all enemies take 20 fire damage at the end of their turn, and all of Jogo's skills deal 10 extra damage.

name: Choso
description: A Death Painting Womb — a hybrid of human and cursed spirit — who uses Blood Manipulation to devastating effect and seeks to protect his brothers.

skills.name: Slicing Exorcism
skills.description: Choso forms a razor wheel of blood and hurls it, dealing 20 damage to one enemy and applying bleeding (5 damage per turn for 3 turns).

skills.name: Piercing Blood
skills.description: Choso fires a highly pressurized beam of blood, dealing 35 damage to one enemy. This skill ignores all damage reduction and invulnerability.

skills.name: Supernova
skills.description: Choso scatters blood orbs that detonate simultaneously like buckshot, dealing 20 damage to all enemies.

skills.name: Flowing Red Scale
skills.description: Choso manipulates his blood to enhance his body's performance. For 3 turns, he gains 15 damage reduction and all his skills cost 1 random energy less.

name: Hajime Kashimo
description: A legendary sorcerer from 400 years ago resurrected for the Culling Game. He uses Genju Kohasaku, an electric-element cursed technique, and seeks to fight Sukuna as the ultimate challenge.

skills.name: Thunderclap Fist
skills.description: Kashimo charges his fist with electric cursed energy and strikes, dealing 25 damage to one enemy.

skills.name: Electric Discharge
skills.description: Kashimo releases an arc of electric energy that chains to multiple targets. Deals 20 damage to all enemies.

skills.name: Genju Kohasaku: Charged Body
skills.description: Kashimo electrifies his own body. For 2 turns, any enemy who strikes him with a Physical attack takes 20 electric damage in return.

skills.name: Mythical Beast Amber
skills.description: Kashimo transforms his body into living lightning, releasing all stored electric energy in a devastating burst. Deals 65 damage to one enemy, ignoring all defensive effects. After using this skill, Kashimo loses all damage reduction for 2 turns.
